title: My Family Is Free Because I Am
subtitle: An affirmation for anchoring the link between your own financial freedom and the freedom it passes forward
excerpt: A brief affirmation from the Day 71 theme of a 12-week money programme. The statement names the chain of freedom directly: your liberation is the source of theirs. Use it when building something with a long time horizon and want to feel the meaning of the daily work.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 71 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

practice.whenToUse: Use in the morning when the daily work of building something long-term feels disconnected from its purpose.

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 71 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 71 centres on picturing generational freedom as a real and buildable outcome. The affirmation names the chain directly: your financial freedom is the direct source of the freedom your family will inherit.
Say it in the morning, hand on heart. Three times. Notice whether it lands as a fact or a wish.
My family is free because I am. What I build now echoes forward.
Adapted from the Day 71 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
